reviews.review_description: An engaging atmospheric VR experience: you enter a haunted house on a raft while monsters jump out from every corner trying to scare you. Dark atmosphere, a few good jump scares, and a ride that delivers some real chills.
A fun rafting ride where monsters pop out from all sides to make you jump!

Really great & frightening experience (ok I did the sweety version cuz I scare easily but it was unnerving not knowing what may happen) its well worth the price, especially now that I'll make my husband go through the terror version (evil cackle). Great dark ride experience that truly haunts!
